prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?

result.status_detail: Security Filter warning bubble rendered with '차단' text; RRN not echoed; no S2 loss

evidence.warning_text_quote: ⚠ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)

comparison_to_baseline.delta: MAJOR IMPROVEMENT — #810 baseline showed indefinite loading dots with NO warning rendered (regression persists). v2.2.3 REBUILT now renders a proper 'Security Filter' warning bubble with the canonical APF block message ('민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다'). Note: this appears to be the H4d v2 (commit 005a8f6) cure path, not the bare v2.2.3 path predicted in the request. Either H4d v2 was already folded into this REBUILT mass-rotation build, or character recovered via a different code path than #810.

recommendation: VERDICT: OK. v2.2.3 REBUILT shows the Korean warning '차단' bubble for character.ai — the prior #810 regression is no longer reproduced. Subsequent loading dots on a regenerated Springtrap bubble (after the Security Filter card) are cosmetic (the warning was already delivered) but worth tracking in a separate frontend item. Engine acceptance criterion (expected_text '차단' present + RRN absent) is MET.
notes: Test PC executed via windows-mcp Chrome automation. First Enter-paste-Enter attempt failed (focus didn't land in message input — input remained empty, no bubble appeared). Second attempt: click input → ctrl+v → click input again → Enter — text submitted, Security Filter bubble appeared within 30s. expected_text '차단' present in DOM ('차단되었습니다'). Followup Springtrap card shows loading dots ('...') but this is AFTER the block warning was already delivered, not blocking criterion. NOTE: request expected FAIL_REGRESSION_PERSISTS like #810 (no H4d v2 in v2.2.3); observed OK instead — H4d v2 cure path may be active in this REBUILT build despite the request notes suggesting otherwise.
